message:
fix(codegen): Add list multiplication type inference and library mode support

Type Inference:
- Add list * int and int * list type inference in expressions.zig
- List multiplication now preserves element type from the list operand
- Partial fix: variable declaration still infers wrong type (known issue)

Library Mode:
- Skip sys.argv initialization when building as library (.Lib or .dynamic)
- Prevents linker errors when metal0 output is used as a shared library
